message.content:
Explore the collabspace-server backend project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server to understand:

1. Find existing announcement/notice/公告 related code (controllers, services, entities, mappers). Search for keywords: announcement, notice, 公告, banner, bulletin
2. Find the admin/management module structure - how are admin pages organized (space management, platform management)
3. Find the permission/role system - how are admin permissions checked (space admin, document admin, platform admin)
4. Find the RabbitMQ consumer pattern - how are message consumers structured
5. Find the scheduled task pattern (ShedLock) - how are scheduled tasks configured
6. Find the existing banner/notification system if any (the cloud drive notice mentioned in requirements)
7. Check the database migration tool (Liquibase) - where are changelog files located
8. Check the entity/table naming conventions

Be thorough - search across multiple naming conventions and locations.
